title: Alocação % por projeto — self-service no widget do membro, tabela dedicada + relatório org

userStories.title: Migration — tabela MemberProjectAllocation com RLS
userStories.description: Criar supabase/migrations/20260611_member_project_allocation.sql com o DDL do §7 (tabela uuid PK, memberId/projectId FKs CASCADE, percent CHECK 0–100, UNIQUE(memberId,projectId), índice projectId, GRANT, RLS com 4 policies: select own-or-manager via is_manager(), insert/update/delete own via Member.userId = auth.uid()) e aplicar via psql "$DIRECT_URL".
acceptanceCriteria: Tabela MemberProjectAllocation existe com CHECK percent 0–100 e UNIQUE (memberId, projectId)
RLS habilitada com 4 policies (select own-or-manager, insert/update/delete own)

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename = 'MemberProjectAllocation'

userStories.title: Migration — Member.weeklyHours default 8
userStories.description: Criar supabase/migrations/20260611b_member_weekly_hours.sql (ALTER Member ADD weeklyHours integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 8 CHECK BETWEEN 1 AND 60 + COMMENT diferenciando de fpCapacity) e aplicar via psql.
acceptanceCriteria: Coluna Member.weeklyHours existe, NOT NULL, default 8, CHECK 1–60

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='Member' AND column_name='weeklyHours'

userStories.title: Atualizar database.types.ts com tabela e coluna novas
userStories.description: Refletir MemberProjectAllocation (Row/Insert/Update/Relationships) e Member.weeklyHours em src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts, seguindo o shape das tabelas vizinhas (ProjectMember).
acceptanceCriteria: Types de MemberProjectAllocation e Member.weeklyHours presentes e usáveis sem cast

userStories.title: GET /api/me/allocations — projetos do squad + % atual
userStories.description: Route handler que resolve o member via getCurrentMember(), lista projetos via ProjectMember (join Project.name), left-join em MemberProjectAllocation e retorna { weeklyHours, totalPercent, projects: [{ projectId, projectName, percent|null, hoursPerWeek|null, updatedAt|null }] }.
acceptanceCriteria: 200 com shape do §8 pra member autenticado; percent null quando sem row

userStories.title: PUT /api/me/allocations — bulk upsert com Zod
userStories.description: No mesmo route.ts, PUT com Zod { allocations: [{ projectId uuid, percent int 0–100 }] }. Valida cada projectId ∈ ProjectMember do member (senão 403), upserta por (memberId, projectId) setando updatedAt/updatedBy, retorna { ok, totalPercent }.
acceptanceCriteria: Upsert idempotente por (memberId, projectId); updatedAt/updatedBy setados
403 pra projectId fora do squad; 400 pra percent fora de 0–100 (Zod)

userStories.title: AllocationWidget em /profile (self-service)
userStories.description: Criar src/components/allocation-widget.tsx (FormBody/Field, Input number nativo, Σ live com badge ✓/âmbar/vermelho, horas derivadas percent/100×weeklyHours, empty state pra member sem squad, salvar via mutate + erros Sonner) e montar em /profile junto do CapacityCard, com copy curta diferenciando % de tempo vs FP.
acceptanceCriteria: Widget lista projetos do GET, edita %, mostra Σ e h/sem derivadas em tempo real
Soma ≠ 100 mostra warning mas salva normalmente; erros via Sonner toast
Empty state pra member sem squad

verifiable.command_or_query: Logar como PB com 2 projetos, setar 60/40, salvar, recarregar — valores persistem

userStories.title: View member_allocation_report + GET /api/members/allocations (manager)
userStories.description: Criar supabase/migrations/20260611c_member_allocation_report_view.sql (view member × project × percent × hours_per_week × updated_at, GRANT SELECT) e endpoint manager-only retornando as rows da view (requireMinLevelApi MANAGER).
acceptanceCriteria: View retorna member × project × percent × hours_per_week × updated_at
Endpoint 200 pra manager, 403 pra builder, 401 sem sessão

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.views WHERE table_name='member_allocation_report'
